name: Axis Airtel Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Annual fee waived on spending ₹2,00,000 in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 25% cashback on Airtel bill payments and mobile recharges

welcomeBenefits.condition: Activated on first transaction within 30 days

pros: 25% cashback on Airtel is unmatched for Airtel users
10% cashback on Swiggy, Zomato, and BigBasket is excellent for food and groceries
Welcome benefits worth ₹1,000 offset the joining fee
4 domestic lounge visits per year add travel convenience

faqs.question: Do I need to be an Airtel customer to apply?
faqs.answer: While you can apply without being an Airtel customer, the card's biggest benefit (25% cashback on Airtel) is only useful for Airtel subscribers. You can link your Airtel account post-issuance.

faqs.question: What Airtel benefits are included in the welcome offer?
faqs.answer: The ₹1,000 welcome benefit includes Airtel Thanks benefits such as free OTT subscriptions (Airtel Xstream, Amazon Prime trial), data add-ons, and other Airtel ecosystem perks.

faqs.question: Is the 25% cashback on Airtel really unlimited?
faqs.answer: No, the 25% cashback on Airtel bill payments and recharges is capped at ₹250 per month. This means you get maximum benefit on about ₹1,000 of Airtel spending per month.

faqs.question: Can I use this card for non-Airtel expenses?
faqs.answer: Yes, you get 10% cashback on Swiggy, Zomato, and BigBasket, plus 1% cashback on all other spends. However, the base rate is lower than cards like Axis ACE.
